response.justification: Strong generalist senior/staff engineer with 10+ years of production experience, recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, and clear technical-leadership signals (workshops, talks, mentoring). However, the resume shows only ~7 months of explicit GenAI/agent work, no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), data pipelines for unstructured data, or AI systems on major cloud platforms — all of which are required for this Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. A screening call is warranted to probe depth of recent AI work.
strengths: 10+ years shipping production software across full-stack, backend, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership: workshops, talks, mentoring, and TDD/craftsmanship culture
concerns: No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no clear GenAI-on-cloud delivery footprint
GenAI/agent experience appears to be ~7 months; required profile expects 8 years of AI-driven solutions

key_factors.factor: Missing required GenAI depth (RAG, vector DBs, multi-agent frameworks)
Recent MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience
Strong staff-level engineering and customer-facing leadership track record
